tasks.title: ApcliGroup class + ApcliConfig/ApcliMode types + RESERVED_GROUP_NAMES + APCORE_CLI_APCLI env parser
Split registerDiscoveryCommands into list/describe/exec registrars, attach to apcli group
Split registerSystemCommands into 6 per-subcommand registrars sharing a probe helper
tasks.notes: registerConfigCommand kept (apcliGroup, executor) signature. Dispatcher table in task 6 set requiresExecutor=true for config.

tasks.title: Split registerCompletionCommand under apcli; rewrite bash/zsh/fish generators via Commander introspection
Wire ApcliGroup + _registerApcliSubcommands into createCli, gate discovery flags, drop BUILTIN_COMMANDS
tasks.notes: validate/exec/config/describe-pipeline all require executor (requiresExecutor=true). BUILTIN_COMMANDS + 3 monolithic registrar wrappers deleted.

tasks.title: Hard exit 2 on reserved 'apcli' at group/auto-group/top-level; migrate extraCommands check
Standalone-mode root-level deprecation shims forwarding to apcli subcommands
tasks.notes: Forwarding via apcliSub.parseAsync(tail, {from: 'user'}); allowUnknownOption+allowExcessArguments to preserve args/opts. Only emits shims for apcli subcommands actually registered (skips executor-required ones when no executor).

tasks.title: Conformance fixtures (T-APCLI-31) + startup benchmark within 5% (T-APCLI-32)
tasks.notes: PARTIAL vs Python: no apcore_cli/builtin_group.py exists in sibling Python repo. Goldens are TS-self-consistent; TODO markers track harmonization when Python ships FE-13. Startup benchmark avg 0.252ms vs baseline 10ms (ratio 0.025, within budget).

tasks.title: CHANGELOG v0.7.0 entry + README update + CLAUDE.md v0.7.0 Conventions + purge BUILTIN_COMMANDS refs
tasks.notes: BUILTIN_COMMANDS in src/+tests/ = 0; remaining 4 hits are CHANGELOG historical entries + v0.7.0 'Removed' entry (intentional).

test_results.failed_tests_note: 2 pre-existing failures in tests/display-helpers.test.ts (binding overlay fallback) — unrelated to FE-13; present on clean HEAD before any FE-13 work.

known_partials: cross-language-conformance: Python reference has not yet shipped FE-13; goldens are TS-self-consistent. Harmonize when upstream Python ports FE-13.
review: cross-module aggregation agent (D5/D7/D10-D15) skipped due to API usage limit. Re-run /code-forge:review builtin-group after reset for full coverage.

fixes.root_cause: Code-level issues identified by /code-forge:review: yaml snake_case key drop (disable_env), _ALWAYS_REGISTERED check ordering, silent empty-registry fallback, raw-Error throws bypassing EXIT_CODES, extraCommands vs deprecation-shim collision UX, Commander _hidden private-field reach-in, missing WARN on unknown include/exclude entries, and misnamed config key in error messages.
fixes.test_results_after: 441 passed, 2 pre-existing display-helpers failures (unrelated to FE-13)

review.top_finding: src/builtin-group.ts:199 — disable_env from yaml silently ignored due to snake/camel key mismatch (breaks T-APCLI-14/15/37/41)
